description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, heart-shaped green leaves with prominent white veins. The plant is supported by several slender, light brown stems that emerge from a round, unglazed terracotta pot. The pot has a simple, slightly tapered cylindrical shape and contains visible dark soil at the top. The leaves are arranged at varying heights and angles, giving the plant a natural, slightly asymmetrical appearance. The overall look is clean and minimal, with no visible decorative elements or labels on the pot. This type of plant is commonly used to add greenery to indoor or sheltered outdoor urban spaces.
description: A medium potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves and slender stems in a plain terracotta pot with visible soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large, heart-shaped leaves prominently displayed, with the pot and soil clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled stems and the spread of the leaves, with the pot's round shape and soil visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the largest leaf facing forward and the other leaves partially obscured, showing the pot's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the arrangement of stems and leaves, with the pot's side and soil visible.
